provider:select wires the implementation the configuration names; case
providers match by type, and the default comes from the config field.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind string `yaml:"kind" default:"memory"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Store interface {
	Greet(name string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Greet(name string) string { return "memory: " + name }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory() *Memory { return &Memory{} }

type Sqlite struct{}

func (*Sqlite) Greet(name string) string { return "sqlite: " + name }

//fabrik:provider case=sqlite
func NewSqlite() (*Sqlite, error) { return &Sqlite{}, nil }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type API struct {
	Store store.Store
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (a *API) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Write([]byte(a.Store.Greet("x")))
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/store"
	"app/web"
)

func run() (err error) {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	defer func() {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			err = nil
		}
	}()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	// Config
	storeConfig, err := config.Load[store.Config](
		config.FileOptional("config.yaml"),
		config.FileOptional("config.local.yaml"),
		config.KnownSections("store"),
		config.Section("store"),
	)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}

	// Providers
	// store.Store, selected by store.kind
	var storeStore store.Store
	switch storeConfig.Kind {
	case "memory":
		storeStore = store.NewMemory()
	case "sqlite":
		storeStoreSqlite, err := store.NewSqlite()
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		storeStore = storeStoreSqlite
	default:
		return fmt.Errorf("no store.Store implementation for %q", storeConfig.Kind)
	}
	webAPI := &web.API{
		Store: storeStore,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", webAPI.Index)

	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() { errc <- HTTPServer(ctx, r) }()
	var result error
	for range 1 {
		if e := <-errc; e != nil && !errors.Is(e, context.Canceled) && result == nil {
			result = e
			cancel()
		}
	}
	return result
}

func HTTPServer(ctx context.Context, r *router.Router) error {
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr}
	srv.Handler = r
	errc := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if srv.TLSConfig != nil {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServeTLS("", "")
		} else {
			errc <- srv.ListenAndServe()
		}
	}()
	select {
	case err := <-errc:
		if errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
			return nil
		}
		return err
	case <-ctx.Done():
	}
	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Second)
	defer cancel()
	return srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
}
